title: Prepared statements does not work with multi-value indexes
poc: prepare stmt from 'select * from Bug where ? member of(data)';

set
select * from Bug where 123 member of(data);
key_bug_features: Prepared statement with multi-value index returns empty result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Bug(id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, data JSON NOT NULL, index idx((CAST(data AS UNSIGNED ARRAY)));
CREATE TABLE AnotherBug(id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, bug_id BIGINT, FOREIGN KEY (bug_id) REFERENCES Bug(id));
SELECT * FROM Bug WHERE 123 MEMBER OF(data) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM AnotherBug WHERE bug_id = Bug.id);
